728fb58961164a6d95fdee463fbd2540.title: LOGAN WARRIOR GOINGS
728fb58961164a6d95fdee463fbd2540.description:
Murder Victim
May 5, 2022
Pine Ridge, South Dakota
728fb58961164a6d95fdee463fbd2540.details: The FBI's Minneapolis Field Office is seeking information regarding the death of 6-year-old Logan Warrior Goings.  On May 5, 2022, Logan was inside a family residence on the Pine Ridge Indian Reservation near Pine Ridge, South Dakota, when shots were fired towards and into the residence.  Logan was shot and killed while sitting on a couch.

cb829c4b9cdd4c7aa63e855ca92b2812.title: EMYLEE THAI
cb829c4b9cdd4c7aa63e855ca92b2812.description: Violation of Pretrial Conditions - Tampering with GPS Device (Conspiracy to Commit Health Care Fraud; Conspiracy to Defraud the United States and Pay and Receive Health Care Kickbacks; Payment of Kickbacks in Connection with a Federal Health Care Program); Destruction and Alterations of Records in a Federal Investigation
cb829c4b9cdd4c7aa63e855ca92b2812.caution:
On July 11, 2022, Emylee Thai was charged by indictment with conspiracy to commit health care fraud, conspiracy to defraud the United States and pay and receive health care kickbacks, and payment of kickbacks in connection with a federal health care program. The indictment alleges that beginning in or around 2019, Thai, a laboratory owner, contracted with marketers to refer signed doctors’ orders and beneficiary DNA samples to the laboratory in exchange for a percentage of the reimbursements. The genetic testing, for which Medicare often paid several thousands of dollars per beneficiary, was not medically necessary and often was not used in a beneficiary’s medical treatment. During this time period, Thai’s laboratory billed Medicare approximately $142 million for genetic testing and was paid approximately $95 million on those claims.  

 

Following her arrest, Thai was granted bail with several pre-trial conditions, including wearing a location monitoring device to monitor her location. On December 8, 2022, Thai’s location monitor was removed, and attempts to contact and locate her were unsuccessful.  On December 9, 2022, a federal arrest warrant was issued for Thai in the United States District Court, Southern District of Texas, Houston, Texas, after she was charged with Tampering with GPS Device. Investigation ultimately determined that Thai was able to flee the country via a private airplane to Vietnam utilizing a false identity. 

 

On July 6, 2023, a separate federal arrest warrant was issued for Thai in the United States District Court, Southern District of Texas, Houston, Texas, after she was charged with Destruction and Alterations of Records in a Federal Investigation.
cb829c4b9cdd4c7aa63e855ca92b2812.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED A FLIGHT RISK

000a9f420e7e4df3baf95b0c4c6c6bd9.title: KHALID AHMED SATARY
000a9f420e7e4df3baf95b0c4c6c6bd9.description: Pre-Trial Release Violation (Conspiracy to Commit Health Care Fraud and Wire Fraud; Health Care Fraud; Conspiracy to Defraud the United States and to Pay and Receive Illegal Health Care Kickbacks; Conspiracy to Launder Monetary Instruments)
000a9f420e7e4df3baf95b0c4c6c6bd9.caution:
Khalid Ahmed Satary is wanted for his alleged involvement in a $547 million Health Care Fraud Conspiracy.  Between 2016 and 2019, Satary owned and operated several diagnostic testing laboratories throughout the United States which allegedly billed the Medicare Program for expensive and medically unnecessary genetic tests.  Satary allegedly conspired with dozens of patient recruiters, telemarketing call centers, and telemedicine companies to utilize deceptive marketing campaigns and illegal kickbacks and bribes to generate cancer genetic test samples that reimbursed between $10,000 to $20,000 per sample.  Through his laboratories, Satary billed Medicare for over $547 million.  He also allegedly paid millions of dollars of illegal kickbacks and bribes to doctors and patient recruiters.

 

On September 26, 2019, Satary was indicted in the United States District Court for the Eastern District of Louisiana, New Orleans, Louisiana.  He was arrested and charged with conspiracy to commit health care fraud and wire fraud, health care fraud, conspiracy to defraud the United States and to pay and receive illegal health care kickbacks and bribes, and conspiracy to launder monetary instruments. 

 

Satary was released on bond with conditions to not work in the health care field.  While on bond, Satary allegedly conspired with Houston-based laboratories in Texas to submit fraudulent genetic testing claims to Medicare.  On November 23, 2022, a federal arrest warrant was issued for Satary in the United States District Court for the Eastern District of Louisiana, New Orleans, Louisiana, for pre-trial release violation.
000a9f420e7e4df3baf95b0c4c6c6bd9.remarks: Satary has ties or may travel to Houston, Texas; Atlanta, Georgia; Delray Beach, Florida; Dubai, United Arab Emirates; Jordan; and the Israel/Palestine areas.

ef3577c1462a4c10a8db81a3914a273e.title: OSCAR SANCHEZ-MUNOZ
ef3577c1462a4c10a8db81a3914a273e.caution:
The FBI's Kansas City Field Office is assisting the Kansas City, Kansas, Police Department with the search for Oscar Sanchez-Munoz.  Sanchez-Munoz is wanted for allegedly shooting at a motor vehicle on June 11, 2026, in Wyandotte County, Kansas.  Law enforcement officials believe Sanchez-Munoz may also be involved in a string of shootings in Kansas City, Missouri, on June 16, 2026.

 

On June 16, 2026, Sanchez-Munoz was charged with Criminal Discharge of a Firearm in the District Court of Wyandotte County, Kansas Criminal Department, and a state warrant was issued for his arrest for the incident which occurred on June 11, 2026.
ef3577c1462a4c10a8db81a3914a273e.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS

9456ffa8-08fa-49fa-a811-e7c895014963.title: ROBERT GARRETT STEWART, JR.
9456ffa8-08fa-49fa-a811-e7c895014963.details: Law enforcement authorities are seeking information in the disappearance of Robert Garrett Stewart, Jr., from Montana in October of 2013.

7d54d3dc154843ddaae748d03fb8f375.title: VICTOR EDUARDO MORALES ZELAYA
7d54d3dc154843ddaae748d03fb8f375.description: Racketeering Conspiracy (RICO); Cocaine Importation Conspiracy; Possession of Machine Guns; Conspiracy to Possess Machine Guns
7d54d3dc154843ddaae748d03fb8f375.caution: Victor Eduardo Morales Zelaya is allegedly a national leader and high-ranking member of MS-13 in Honduras and a close associate of Ten Most Wanted Fugitive, Yulan Adonay Archaga Carias.  Morales Zelaya allegedly coordinated the gang’s drug trafficking business, acts of violence (including murders and kidnappings) against rivals, and the movement of proceeds from the gang’s illicit activities.  He is also allegedly responsible for the gang's importation of large amounts of drugs into the United States.  On June 6, 2023, a federal arrest warrant was issued for Morales Zelaya in the United States District Court, Southern District of New York, after he was charged with racketeering conspiracy, cocaine importation conspiracy, and possession and conspiracy to possess machine guns.  This case is being investigated as part of Joint Task Force Vulcan.
7d54d3dc154843ddaae748d03fb8f375.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS

56ebce0db8b5486c9a3923484fbd55c9.title: HOLLIS C. VANLEER, JR.
56ebce0db8b5486c9a3923484fbd55c9.description: First Degree Robbery; Armed Criminal Action; First Degree Assault
56ebce0db8b5486c9a3923484fbd55c9.caution:
The FBI's Kansas City Field Office is assisting the Missouri State Highway Patrol and the Cooper County Sheriff's Office in Missouri with the search for Hollis C. Vanleer, Jr.  Vanleer, Jr, is wanted for his alleged involvement in the robbery of the Isle of Capri Casino in Boonville, Missouri.  On March 25, 2026, two males armed with firearms and wearing masks, sunglasses, and black clothing entered the casino.  They walked to the casino vault at the rear of the building, jumped the cage desk into a restricted area, and stole a large sum of money from a drawer, placing the cash into a duffel bag.  Vanleer, Jr. has been identified as one of the males allegedly involved in this crime.  The second individual has also been charged in Missouri.

 

On April 14, 2026, Vanleer, Jr. was charged with First Degree Robbery, Armed Criminal Action, and First Degree Assault in the 18th Judicial Circuit Court, Cooper County, Missouri, and a state warrant was issued for his arrest.
56ebce0db8b5486c9a3923484fbd55c9.remarks: Vanleer, Jr. has ties to Chicago and Normal, Illinois.
56ebce0db8b5486c9a3923484fbd55c9.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS

c3e0262b3b8c4daaaba9f3399884944f.title: LAMAR T. BROWNING
c3e0262b3b8c4daaaba9f3399884944f.caution: Lamar T. Browning is wanted for his alleged involvement with a criminal organization known as the “Crown Hill Enterprise,” and the operation of a drug trafficking conspiracy in which methamphetamine, crack cocaine, powder cocaine, heroin, oxycodone pills, and fentanyl were sold and distributed out of several trap houses in Indianapolis, Lafayette, and surrounding communities in Indiana, from early 2019 to December 2024.  On March 20, 2025, a federal arrest warrant was issued for Browning in the United States District Court, Southern District of Indiana, Indianapolis, Indiana, after he was charged with Conspiracy to Distribute Controlled Substances.
c3e0262b3b8c4daaaba9f3399884944f.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS

d078deee25ea4b9aa6f4ac4a681e2f65.title: YULAN ADONAY ARCHAGA CARIAS
d078deee25ea4b9aa6f4ac4a681e2f65.description: Racketeering Conspiracy (RICO); Cocaine Importation Conspiracy; Possession of Machine Guns; Conspiracy to Possess Machine Guns
d078deee25ea4b9aa6f4ac4a681e2f65.caution: Yulan Adonay Archaga Carias is charged federally in the Southern District of New York with racketeering conspiracy, cocaine importation conspiracy, and possession and conspiracy to possess machine guns.  As the alleged leader of MS-13 for all of Honduras, Archaga Carias allegedly controlled MS-13 criminal activity in Honduras and provided support and resources to the MS-13 enterprise in Central America and the United States with firearms, narcotics, and cash. Archaga Carias is also allegedly responsible for supporting multi-ton loads of cocaine through Honduras to the United States and for ordering and participating in murders of rival gang members and others associated with MS-13.  This case is being investigated as part of Joint Task Force Vulcan.
d078deee25ea4b9aa6f4ac4a681e2f65.remarks: Archaga Carias is believed to only speak Spanish.
d078deee25ea4b9aa6f4ac4a681e2f65.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND EXTREMELY DANGEROUS

9adc7219d3ea4d5c8b76a65cfca045e1.title: SHOOTING OF MINOR VICTIM
9adc7219d3ea4d5c8b76a65cfca045e1.details: The FBI's Dallas Field Office is seeking information regarding the shooting of a minor victim.  On May 29, 2026, at approximately 10:45 p.m., the Tyler Police Department responded to a shooting at the Victory Park Apartment Homes on 2700 North Grand Avenue in Tyler, Texas. Upon arrival, officers learned that a five-year-old minor victim had been shot.  No one else was injured in the shooting.  Investigators recovered over thirty shell casings and additional evidence from the scene.  Investigators believe this incident to be gang-related with the minor victim an innocent bystander injured by gang violence.  More than one individual is believed to have been involved in the shooting and the suspects, who are still at large, are believed to be male.
9adc7219d3ea4d5c8b76a65cfca045e1.warning_message: SUSPECTS SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS

6d45f47a2ccf4d36aaf7de7d201715e4.title: SALLY TULLOS - AUSTIN, TEXAS
6d45f47a2ccf4d36aaf7de7d201715e4.details:
On March 1, 1983, the body of Sally Tullos was found on the east bank of Barton Creek in Austin, Texas. The morning of her death, she had visited friends and family. It is believed that Tullos then decided to go sunbathing, and drove to Zilker Park, parked her car around 10 a.m., and walked to Barton Creek near Campbell’s Hole. Shortly after arriving, Tullos was attacked and stabbed. It appears that she walked from the stabbing location to where her body was later discovered. A woman found Tullos deceased a mile from Barton Springs Pool, sometime between 11:30 a.m. and 12:30 p.m.

Investigators are asking anyone who may have known Tullos, or have information on this homicide, to contact the Austin Police Department.

525c64c8a82940e3aaae18c532cc3019.title: SA'WADE BIRDINGROUND
525c64c8a82940e3aaae18c532cc3019.details:
Sa'Wade Birdinground was last seen at her family's residence in Garryowen, Montana, within the boundaries of the Crow Indian Reservation, after approximately 11:00 p.m., on October 6, 2024. 

 

She was last seen wearing a black hoodie with mushrooms on it, an anime t-shirt, basketball shorts, and purple slip-on Skechers-brand shoes.  She may have a black and purple Adidas backpack with her.  She is known to wear an elk tooth necklace.

2fd9cbe842c64f2ba7a63aeee2978e21.title: SHELBIE LYNN DWYER
2fd9cbe842c64f2ba7a63aeee2978e21.details: The FBI's Seattle Field Office is working with the Des Moines Police Department in Washington, the United States Government, and Mexican authorities to conduct a formal investigation into the disappearance of Shelbie Lynn Dwyer.  On March 25, 2023, Dwyer voluntarily left the Des Moines, Washington, area and traveled to Mexico via car.  Dwyer maintained sporadic communication with her family, but stopped that communication around March 29, 2023.  Dwyer is believed to have traveled to Tijuana, Mexico. She likely traveled by plane from Tijuana, had a layover in Guadalajara, then arrived in Culiacan, Sinaloa.  Dwyer was last believed to have been in the area of Guamuchil, Sinaloa, Mexico, on or around March 29, 2023. She has not been heard from since that time.

018bb42836e046179c77d8fd0ccea555.title: RAYMOND LAWRENCE GONZALES
018bb42836e046179c77d8fd0ccea555.description: Possession with Intent to Distribute 400 Grams and More of Fentanyl
018bb42836e046179c77d8fd0ccea555.caution: Raymond Lawrence Gonzales is wanted for his alleged involvement in drug-related crimes in New Mexico.  On April 17, 2024, local law enforcement conducted a traffic stop on a car driven by Gonzales.  The vehicle had traveled from Arizona to Albuquerque, New Mexico, and contained approximately 72 kilograms of fentanyl pills.  On June 25, 2024, a federal arrest warrant was issued for Gonzales in the United States District Court, District of New Mexico, Albuquerque, New Mexico, after he was charged with Possession with Intent to Distribute 400 Grams and More of Fentanyl.
018bb42836e046179c77d8fd0ccea555.remarks: Gonzales has ties to Mazatlan and Juarez, Mexico.
018bb42836e046179c77d8fd0ccea555.warning_message: IS KNOWN TO HAVE VIOLENT TENDENCIES

82bcacf074974ee1879fa227815cd13c.title: JULIEANNE BALDUEZA DIMITRION
82bcacf074974ee1879fa227815cd13c.caution: Julieanne Baldueza Dimitrion and her husband, John, were indicted in February of 2009 for mortgage fraud. In April of 2009, they pled guilty to operating a fraud scheme in which they used their companies to convince distressed homeowners to relinquish their homes with the premise of improving the victims' financial position. They promised to invest the proceeds of the home sales, but instead the Dimitrions used the victims' money to fund their own lavish lifestyles. As a result, multiple families in Oahu, Hawaii, lost their homes. The Dimitrions were scheduled to be sentenced in the United States District Court in Honolulu, Hawaii, on July 6, 2010, but failed to appear at the sentencing. A federal arrest warrant for failure to appear was then issued for each of them.
82bcacf074974ee1879fa227815cd13c.remarks: The Dimitrions were last known to be in the Mililani area of Oahu, Hawaii. Julieanne Dimitrion has expensive tastes in clothing, specifically high-end lingerie, designer purses, and shoes.

27f6739b638b437192b1bb4fdb0426d3.title: JOHN MICHAEL DIMITRION
27f6739b638b437192b1bb4fdb0426d3.caution: John Michael Dimitrion and his wife, Julieanne, were indicted in February of 2009 for mortgage fraud. In April of 2009, they pled guilty to operating a fraud scheme in which they used their companies to convince distressed homeowners to relinquish their homes with the premise of improving the victims' financial position. They promised to invest the proceeds of the home sales, but instead the Dimitrions used the victims' money to fund their own lavish lifestyles. As a result, multiple families in Oahu, Hawaii, lost their homes. The Dimitrions were scheduled to be sentenced in the United States District Court in Honolulu, Hawaii, on July 6, 2010, but failed to appear at the sentencing. A federal arrest warrant for failure to appear was then issued for each of them.
27f6739b638b437192b1bb4fdb0426d3.remarks: The Dimitrions were last known to be in the Mililani area of Oahu, Hawaii. John Dimitrion has expensive tastes in sports cars, clothing and jewelry. He is an enthusiast for high-end personal electronics and has a large collection of Airsoft replica firearms.

4ee774e868264535863c0d6d52fb7c18.title: RODNEY DEAN ALLEN
4ee774e868264535863c0d6d52fb7c18.caution:
It is alleged that from approximately 2016 to approximately 2017, Rodney Dean Allen devised a scheme to defraud clients of his brokerage company, KA Investments, LLC, obtain their money by false pretenses and promises, and misappropriate their money.  Additionally, Allen allegedly misrepresented in monthly statements provided to clients that they were earning positive returns on investments, when in fact, clients were earning negative returns on investments.  For instance, on December 6, 2016, Allen allegedly emailed a November 2016 monthly statement to a client.  In the statement, Allen represented that the client’s account had earned 1.903 percent that month.  In reality, the client’s account had lost 36.01 percent.   Furthermore, Allen allegedly misrepresented to clients of KA Investments, LLC that he was taking between a 14-percent and 18-percent commission on investment profits.  In truth, he was misappropriating client deposits for his personal use, regardless of profit or loss, and at a greater percentage. 

 

A federal arrest warrant was issued by the United States District Court, District of Idaho, on January 10, 2018, after Allen was charged with wire fraud.

Allen has been missing since April 20, 2017, and his whereabouts remain unknown.
4ee774e868264535863c0d6d52fb7c18.remarks: Allen may be in possession of a handgun. He may also have suicidal tendencies.

a3f97e0c1a0844ada418669872d0dd55.title: CHRISTOPHER YOUNG
a3f97e0c1a0844ada418669872d0dd55.description: Possession of a Firearm by a Felon
a3f97e0c1a0844ada418669872d0dd55.caution: Christopher Young is wanted on charges of possession of a firearm by a felon.  On April 23, 2026, a federal arrest warrant was issued for Young in the United States District Court, Eastern District of Pennsylvania, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, after he was charged with possession of a firearm by a felon.
a3f97e0c1a0844ada418669872d0dd55.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS AND AN ESCAPE RISK

2a19f6cd74ad405f81af8f79fda32aed.title: MICHAEL LIZASO MARASIGAN
2a19f6cd74ad405f81af8f79fda32aed.description: Violation of Conditions of Pretrial Release (Conspiracy to Operate Illegal Gambling Business; Money Laundering Conspiracy; Money Laundering; Conspiracy to Commit Wire Fraud)
2a19f6cd74ad405f81af8f79fda32aed.caution:
Michael Lizaso Marasigan is wanted for violations of his pretrial release.  From March of 2015, to December 31, 2021, he and his co-conspirators defrauded bingo patrons at the Guam Shrine Club’s (GSC) Hafa Adai Bingo by misrepresenting to them that their funds would be used for transporting children to the Shriner’s Hospital for Children in Hawaii for medical care. The defendants’ operation of the illegal gambling business and fraud scheme generated at least $34 million in bingo proceeds. Instead of allocating the fundraising proceeds for the nonprofit organization’s children transportation fund, the defendants laundered funds and diverted approximately $10,750,804 million of the proceeds for themselves and others.

 

In May of 2025, Marasigan was found guilty on charges of Conspiracy to Operate Illegal Gambling Business, Money Laundering Conspiracy, Money Laundering, and Conspiracy to Commit Wire Fraud.  He filed and was awarded a Stipulation to Travel with the court, which allowed Marasigan to travel to the Philippines for medical reasons.  Marasigan did not return on the required date and ceased contact with the court in June of 2025.  On June 25, 2025, a federal arrest warrant was issued for Marasigan in the United States District Court, District of Guam, Hagatna, Guam, after he was charged with Violation of Conditions of Pretrial Release.  On May 18, 2026, Marasigan was sentenced in absentia to 262 months in federal prison, and ordered to pay $10,750,804 joint and several restitution to the Aloha Shriners, $5,871,493 money judgment forfeiture, and $6,500 mandatory assessment fee.
2a19f6cd74ad405f81af8f79fda32aed.remarks: Marasigan has ties to Guam and the Philippines.  He is a dual citizen of the United States and the Philippines, and holds passports for both countries.
2a19f6cd74ad405f81af8f79fda32aed.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED AN ESCAPE RISK

9627161690684c62ada3daa4dee61645.title: ELAINE ANGENE ESCOE
9627161690684c62ada3daa4dee61645.description: Conspiracy to Commit Wire Fraud; Conspiracy to Commit Money Laundering; Wire Fraud; Concealment Money Laundering; Transactional Money Laundering
9627161690684c62ada3daa4dee61645.caution:
Elaine Angene Escoe is wanted for her alleged involvement in a conspiracy to commit wire fraud and money laundering in connection with a scheme to fraudulently obtain over $32 million in federal COVID-19 relief funds. Escoe and her five co-defendants, all of whom have either been found guilty at trial or have pleaded guilty, allegedly submitted more than 90 fraudulent applications for funds from the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP), Economic Injury Disaster Loans (EIDL), Restaurant Revitalization Fund (RRF), and Shuttered Venue Operators Grant (SVOG) between May of 2020, and November of 2021. The applications contained false information regarding employee counts, payroll expenses, and business revenues.  The scheme resulted in the wrongful disbursement of approximately $29.1 million in PPP funds, $1.2 million in RRF funds, and $3.8 million in SVOG funds.  After the funds were disbursed, Escoe and others allegedly directed payments to each other and to businesses they controlled, withdrew large sums in cash, and used blank, signed checks to conceal the origin and nature of the proceeds. 

 

A federal arrest warrant was issued for Escoe on May 22, 2025, in the United States District Court, Southern District of Florida, West Palm Beach, Florida, after she was charged with Conspiracy to Commit Wire Fraud; Conspiracy to Commit Money Laundering; Wire Fraud; Concealment Money Laundering, and Transactional Money Laundering.

At the time the arrest warrant was issued, Escoe was notified of her scheduled court appearance on June 5, 2025, but failed to appear.  Escoe was last seen on June 3, 2025, in Palm Beach County, Florida.
9627161690684c62ada3daa4dee61645.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED A FLIGHT RISK

15529f5e35374063b38ba56984e73f77.title: CHRISTOPHER W. BURNS
15529f5e35374063b38ba56984e73f77.caution: Christopher W. Burns is wanted for his alleged involvement in a mail fraud scheme in Georgia.  It is alleged that Burns defrauded dozens of victims of at least $10 million.  As part of his scheme, Burns allegedly falsely told victims that he was investing their money in a “peer to peer” lending program in which loans were backed by collateral. In reality, the collateral promised by Burns either did not exist at all or was worth substantially less than Burns represented.  He has not been seen since he left his home on September 24, 2020, one day before he was supposed to turn over documents related to his businesses to the Securities and Exchange Commission.  A federal arrest warrant was issued for Burns on October 23, 2020, in the United States District Court, Northern District of Georgia, Atlanta, Georgia, after he was charged with mail fraud.
15529f5e35374063b38ba56984e73f77.remarks: Burns' last residence was in Berkeley Lake, Georgia.  The vehicle he was driving was found abandoned in Dunwoody, Georgia.

4ff6d3cd2681485c812169495867e088.title: ARTHUR LEE COFIELD
4ff6d3cd2681485c812169495867e088.caution:
The FBI's Atlanta Field Office is assisting the United States Marshals Service with the search for Arthur Lee Cofield.  Cofield is wanted for escaping from the Federal Correctional Institute (FCI) Jesup, located in Jesup, Georgia, on the afternoon of May 26, 2026.  He was there serving a more than 11-year-sentence after being convicted of Conspiracy to Commit Bank Fraud and Aggravated Identity Theft in 2024.

 

On May 27, 2026, Cofield was charged with Escape from Custody in the United States District Court, Southern District of Georgia, Brunswick, Georgia, and a federal warrant was issued for his arrest.
4ff6d3cd2681485c812169495867e088.remarks: Cofield has ties to the Atlanta, Georgia, Metropolitan area.
4ff6d3cd2681485c812169495867e088.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS

d99179c57542474fa21de4cd5d589b6a.title: LEOBARDO PENA GUTIERREZ
d99179c57542474fa21de4cd5d589b6a.description: Conspiracy to Possess with Intent to Distribute Methamphetamine; Possession with Intent to Distribute Methamphetamine; Criminal Forfeiture
d99179c57542474fa21de4cd5d589b6a.caution: Leobardo Pena Gutierrez is wanted for his alleged involvement in drug-related crimes in Gallatin County, Montana, between May of 2020, and September of 2020.  On May 20, 2021, a federal arrest warrant was issued for Gutierrez in the United States District Court, District of Montana, Butte Division, Billings, Montana, after he was charged with Conspiracy to Possess with Intent to Distribute Methamphetamine, Possession with Intent to Distribute Methamphetamine, and Criminal Forfeiture.

650c7a28eb26846598ea425244513814.title: STEVEN EUGENE CLIFFORD
650c7a28eb26846598ea425244513814.description: Unlawful Flight to Avoid Prosecution - Failure to Appear (Sexual Assault - 17 Counts)
650c7a28eb26846598ea425244513814.caution: Steven Eugene Clifford is wanted for the alleged sexual assaults of eleven victims from 1998 through 2002. Clifford was a licensed chiropractor who operated an office in Carnelian Bay, California, for several years. In January of 2002, he was arrested by the Placer County Sheriff's Department for sexually assaulting several of his patients, including a juvenile. A seventeen count felony complaint was filed in February of 2002 in the Superior Court of California, County of Placer, alleging the sexual assault charges. Clifford pleaded "no contest" to three of the counts, but failed to appear for his January 28, 2003, sentencing. On August 4, 2004, a federal unlawful flight to avoid prosecution complaint was obtained in the United States District Court, Eastern District of California, Sacramento, California, based on the multiple state charges of sexual assault.
650c7a28eb26846598ea425244513814.remarks:
Clifford initially traveled to the Baja California Peninsula (East Coast) region of Mexico, but could now be in France, Belgium, or Canada. It is believed that he fled the United States driving a 2002 metallic tan Dodge Extended Cab XL-T truck towing a white fifth wheel camper.

Clifford is known to enjoy boating, camping, and riding motorcycles. He has a habit of picking his beard or facial hair. Clifford consumes alcohol heavily and is known to frequent nightclubs. He speaks some French.

Clifford is believed to be taking prescription Lithium.
650c7a28eb26846598ea425244513814.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS

c5a312f71a3d4a8995888bbc9b279236.title: ROBINSON ANDRES CAMACHO-RODRIGUEZ
c5a312f71a3d4a8995888bbc9b279236.description: Conspiracy to Commit Interstate Transportation, Transmittal, or Transfer of Stolen Property
c5a312f71a3d4a8995888bbc9b279236.caution: Robinson Andres Camacho-Rodriguez is alleged to have operated in a group of seven individuals, including Jesson Quintero and Jhon Alexander Quintero-Cadena, who travelled north from the Los Angeles, California, area to target and burglarize the homes of Asian families in the Pacific Northwest. The group allegedly used sophisticated techniques to identify, surveil, and burglarize their victims. Devices like trail cameras and Wi-Fi jammers were used at victims’ homes.  These crimes occurred in Auburn, Washington, on October 3, 2025; Eugene, Oregon, on October 6, 2025; and Salem, Oregon, on October 9, 2025.  A federal arrest warrant was issued for Camacho-Rodriguez on November 4, 2025, in the United States District Court for the District of Oregon, Eugene, Oregon, after he was charged with Conspiracy to Commit Interstate Transportation, Transmittal, or Transfer of Stolen Property.
c5a312f71a3d4a8995888bbc9b279236.remarks: Camacho-Rodriguez has ties to the Paramount and Lynwood areas of Los Angeles, California. He speaks Spanish and maybe some English.
c5a312f71a3d4a8995888bbc9b279236.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED AN ESCAPE RISK

8e6090152d6640929912f934a8611f5b.title: JHON ALEXANDER QUINTERO-CADENA
8e6090152d6640929912f934a8611f5b.description: Conspiracy to Commit Interstate Transportation, Transmittal, or Transfer of Stolen Property
8e6090152d6640929912f934a8611f5b.caution: Jhon Alexander Quintero-Cadena is alleged to have operated in a group of seven individuals, including Robinson Andres Camacho-Rodriguez and Jesson Quintero, who travelled north from the Los Angeles, California, area to target and burglarize the homes of Asian families in the Pacific Northwest. The group allegedly used sophisticated techniques to identify, surveil, and burglarize their victims. Devices like trail cameras and Wi-Fi jammers were used at victims’ homes.  These crimes occurred in Auburn, Washington, on October 3, 2025; Eugene, Oregon, on October 6, 2025; and Salem, Oregon, on October 9, 2025.  A federal arrest warrant was issued for Quintero-Cadena on November 4, 2025, in the United States District Court for the District of Oregon, Eugene, Oregon, after he was charged with Conspiracy to Commit Interstate Transportation, Transmittal, or Transfer of Stolen Property.
8e6090152d6640929912f934a8611f5b.remarks: Quintero-Cadena has ties to Los Angeles, California, and Colombia.  He speaks Spanish.
8e6090152d6640929912f934a8611f5b.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED AN ESCAPE RISK

7d7e51ca02504387be5e7ee0cadb11ce.title: JENNIFER LIN
7d7e51ca02504387be5e7ee0cadb11ce.description:
Murder Victim
Castro Valley, California
May 27, 1994
7d7e51ca02504387be5e7ee0cadb11ce.details: On May 27, 1994, then 14-year-old Jennifer Lin, also known as Jenny Lin, was brutally murdered in her home in Castro Valley, California, after returning from school.  The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) and the Alameda County Sheriff's Office in California, are seeking information from the public to help solve this murder.

a7878502656446b8bc479b6347f0fe09.title: JESSON QUINTERO
a7878502656446b8bc479b6347f0fe09.description: Conspiracy to Commit Interstate Transportation, Transmittal, or Transfer of Stolen Property
a7878502656446b8bc479b6347f0fe09.caution: Jesson Quintero is alleged to have operated in a group of seven individuals, including Robinson Andres Camacho-Rodriguez and Jhon Alexander Quintero-Cadena, who travelled north from the Los Angeles, California, area to target and burglarize the homes of Asian families in the Pacific Northwest. The group allegedly used sophisticated techniques to identify, surveil, and burglarize their victims. Devices like trail cameras and Wi-Fi jammers were used at victims’ homes.  These crimes occurred in Auburn, Washington, on October 3, 2025; Eugene, Oregon, on October 6, 2025; and Salem, Oregon, on October 9, 2025.  A federal arrest warrant was issued for Quintero on November 4, 2025, in the United States District Court for the District of Oregon, Eugene, Oregon, after he was charged with Conspiracy to Commit Interstate Transportation, Transmittal, or Transfer of Stolen Property.
a7878502656446b8bc479b6347f0fe09.remarks: Quintero has ties to Los Angeles, California, and Colombia.  He speaks Spanish and maybe some English.
a7878502656446b8bc479b6347f0fe09.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED AN ESCAPE RISK

57cb7d60cd5643eebb6ce8f7b285917d.title: MONICA ELFRIEDE WITT
57cb7d60cd5643eebb6ce8f7b285917d.description: Conspiracy to Deliver National Defense Information to Representatives of a Foreign Government; Delivering National Defense Information to Representatives of a Foreign Government
57cb7d60cd5643eebb6ce8f7b285917d.caution: Monica Elfriede Witt is wanted for her alleged involvement in criminal activities to include espionage and conspiracy to commit espionage.  On February 8, 2019, a grand jury in the United States District Court, District of Columbia, indicted Witt and a federal arrest warrant was issued for her after she was charged with Conspiracy to Deliver National Defense Information to Representatives of a Foreign Government and Delivering National Defense Information to Representatives of a Foreign Government, specifically the Government of Iran.
57cb7d60cd5643eebb6ce8f7b285917d.remarks: Witt is known to speak Farsi and reside in Iran.
57cb7d60cd5643eebb6ce8f7b285917d.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED AN INTERNATIONAL FLIGHT RISK

f2f247224152479483519098b56ade7f.title: BOB TANG
f2f247224152479483519098b56ade7f.description: Unlawful Flight to Avoid Prosecution - Murder
f2f247224152479483519098b56ade7f.caution: Bob Tang is wanted for his alleged involvement in the murder of a man in Alameda County, California, on May 14, 2017.  It is alleged that Tang murdered the victim, dismembered the body, and then fled to his homeland of Cambodia.  On November 2, 2017, a felony arrest warrant was issued for Tang in the County of Alameda, California, after he was charged with murder.  On March 26, 2019, a federal arrest warrant was issued in the United States District Court, Northern District of California, San Francisco, California, after Tang was charged with unlawful flight to avoid prosecution.
f2f247224152479483519098b56ade7f.remarks: Tang is known to enjoy hiking.  He is a naturalized United States citizen and has ties to Phnom Penh, Cambodia.
f2f247224152479483519098b56ade7f.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS

341de1cfaa774a158f1ea78815e76d30.title: VANESSA O'ROURKE
341de1cfaa774a158f1ea78815e76d30.caution: Vanessa O’Rourke is wanted for allegedly fraudulently representing to her family and friends that she had been diagnosed with a terminal form of brain cancer known as a glioblastoma, and told them she needed money to aid in her medical treatment and to support her while she was ill.  Between October of 2015 and July of 2016, O'Rourke further represented to family and friends that she needed to travel to Australia to participate in an experimental treatment for her purported cancer.  Through her false and fraudulent pretenses, her family and others provided money and support.  In or around April of 2016, O'Rourke traveled to Australia, where she engaged in a variety of leisure activities and did not receive any medical treatment.  Upon her return to the United States, O'Rourke enlisted her friends and family to organize two fundraisers on her behalf.  A webpage was established and a benefit event held at a local restaurant in Pennsylvania, both resulting in numerous people providing donations for her purported cancer treatment.  O'Rourke utilized those funds to travel to Australia again in or around 2016, where she again engaged in various leisure activities and received no medical treatment for her nonexistent illness.  O'Rourke was indicted on 15 counts of wire fraud in the United States District Court for the Eastern District of Pennsylvania on May 3, 2018, and a federal warrant was issued for her arrest.

8047423326854f4082604c1111320665.title: JANE DOE - MEDFORD, NEW YORK
8047423326854f4082604c1111320665.details: On December 7, 1994, the remains of an unidentified White female were found in a discarded blue Rubbermaid garbage can along Long Island Avenue in Medford, New York. The victim, referred to as the Medford Jane Doe, had a scar in the center of her right calf and a tattoo on her upper left shoulder of a red heart draped with a banner and the name Adrian on it. The victim was wearing a black cotton halter top crew neck with a J.J. Cochran label (size XL) and was found with a Hilton Hotel bathmat. Facial reconstruction images of what the victim is believed to look like, as well as an image of what her tattoo appeared like prior to death are above. Dental records are available for comparison.

1e95dff036d440b1a0a8fd25649ccfa7.title: NAZEER HAMEED
1e95dff036d440b1a0a8fd25649ccfa7.description: Unlawful Flight to Avoid Prosecution - First Degree Murder (Two Counts), Third Degree Possession of a Weapon for an Unlawful Purpose (Two Counts), Fourth Degree Unlawful Possession of a Weapon
1e95dff036d440b1a0a8fd25649ccfa7.caution: Nazeer Hameed is wanted for his alleged involvement in the murder of a woman and her 6-year-old son inside their apartment in Maple Shade, New Jersey, on the evening of March 23, 2017.  On September 1, 2017, Hameed is thought to have left the United States and traveled to India.  On February 6, 2025, Hameed was charged with First Degree Murder (Two Counts); Third Degree Possession of a Weapon for an Unlawful Purpose (Two Counts); and Fourth Degree Unlawful Possession of a Weapon in the State of New Jersey, Superior Court of New Jersey Law Division, Burlington County, New Jersey, and a state warrant was issued for his arrest.  On May 13, 2026, a federal arrest warrant was issued for Hameed in the United States District Court, District of New Jersey, Camden, New Jersey, after he was charged with unlawful flight to avoid prosecution.
1e95dff036d440b1a0a8fd25649ccfa7.remarks: Hameed is known to be living in India.
1e95dff036d440b1a0a8fd25649ccfa7.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS

1d6a877c08ff4c1ca28f408dc6e76a27.title: TRACY MCMATH - MANNHEIM, GERMANY
1d6a877c08ff4c1ca28f408dc6e76a27.details: On September 27, 1987, Tracy McMath, a 20-year-old military dependent spouse, was reported missing by a friend. A welfare check was conducted at McMath’s apartment in Mannheim, Germany, wherein she was found deceased in the bathtub. At the time of her death, McMath was pregnant. McMath’s ATM card was stolen and used to withdraw $600 in Kaiserslautern and Heidelberg. Investigators are attempting to identify anyone who has information on the homicide. If you have any information, please contact the Department of the Army Criminal Investigation Division.

63317cf0ccc44bb8a3f4bf834e2231f9.title: RODOLFO MANTILLA
63317cf0ccc44bb8a3f4bf834e2231f9.description: Conspiracy to Possess with Intent to Distribute Controlled Substances; Possession with Intent to Distribute Controlled Substances; Distribution of a Controlled Substance
63317cf0ccc44bb8a3f4bf834e2231f9.caution:
Rodolfo Mantilla is wanted for allegedly importing bulk kilogram quantities of cocaine into the United States, specifically South Florida. It is alleged that the narcotics are then provided to distributors who sell the drugs for Mantilla, and provide him the cash. 

 

On April 11, 2024, a federal arrest warrant was issued for Mantilla in the United States District Court for the Southern District of Florida, Ft. Lauderdale, Florida, after he was charged with Conspiracy to Possess with Intent to Distribute Controlled Substances; Possession with Intent to Distribute Controlled Substances; and Distribution of a Controlled Substance.
63317cf0ccc44bb8a3f4bf834e2231f9.remarks: Mantilla has ties to or may visit the Dominican Republic and the Bahamas.
63317cf0ccc44bb8a3f4bf834e2231f9.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED AN ESCAPE RISK

f05cba69aa3244b6ad1b57d232cd5160.title: KASHAWN NICOLA ROPER
f05cba69aa3244b6ad1b57d232cd5160.description: Unlawful Flight to Avoid Prosecution - Second Degree Murder, Armed Criminal Action, Unlawful Use of a Weapon
f05cba69aa3244b6ad1b57d232cd5160.caution: KaShawn Nicola Roper is wanted for her alleged involvement in a shooting on August 23, 2020, in Kansas City, Missouri.  During an altercation, it is alleged that Roper fired multiple shots at a car which struck two female victims, resulting in the death of one of them.  On September 10, 2020, Roper was charged with second degree murder, armed criminal action, and unlawful use of a weapon in the 16th Judicial Circuit, Jackson County, Missouri, and a state warrant was issued for her arrest. On July 1, 2021, a federal arrest warrant was issued for Roper in the United States District Court, Western District of Missouri, Kansas City, Missouri, after she was charged with unlawful flight to avoid prosecution.
f05cba69aa3244b6ad1b57d232cd5160.remarks: Roper has previously resided in Kansas City, Missouri. Roper has ties to, or may visit, Kansas, Nebraska, Texas, Colorado, Georgia, and South Dakota.
f05cba69aa3244b6ad1b57d232cd5160.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS

11f93b91a98e43de828a9f6be58a8390.title: ALIZA SPENCER
11f93b91a98e43de828a9f6be58a8390.description:
Murder Victim
Binghamton, New York
April 21, 2022
11f93b91a98e43de828a9f6be58a8390.details: The Federal Bureau of Investigation in Albany, New York, and the Binghamton Police Department are seeking information regarding the death of 12-year-old Aliza Spencer.  On April 21, 2022, Aliza was struck in the chest by a bullet while walking on the sidewalk with her father and brother near their home on Bigelow Street in the city of Binghamton, New York. She later died at the hospital.  Information is being sought that would lead to the identification, arrest, and conviction of the individual(s) responsible for her murder.

2e3067a9450449cb80b783a64a43f78f.title: ROLAND PLAINFEATHER
2e3067a9450449cb80b783a64a43f78f.details: Roland Plainfeather was last seen on April 19, 2026, near Pryor, Montana.  He was last seen wearing a thin, gray-colored jacket, black and white colored Puma shoes, and a white-colored baseball cap.  Based on the circumstances of his disappearance, and the cold weather, law enforcement has reason to believe Roland Plainfeather may be in danger.

1f79104a765c4111a04987ef2adcd034.title: AUSTIN JAN SY YATCO
1f79104a765c4111a04987ef2adcd034.description: Sexual Exploitation of Children; Material Involving Sexual Exploitation of Minors; Certain Activities Relating to Material Constituting or Containing Child Pornography
occupations: Yatco Holds a degree in Computer Science and has worked in the technology sector.
1f79104a765c4111a04987ef2adcd034.caution: Austin Jan Sy Yatco is wanted for his alleged involvement in the exploitation of minor victims between 2019 and 2021, as part of an online group whose members carried out alleged criminal conduct on a series of gaming and social media platforms.  Minor victims were allegedly coerced into creating child pornography of themselves which was allegedly distributed amongst the online group.  A federal arrest warrant was issued for Yatco on January 23, 2026, in the United States District Court for the Eastern District of New York, Brooklyn, New York, after he was charged with Sexual Exploitation of Children, Material Involving Sexual Exploitation of Minors, and Certain Activities Relating to Material Constituting or Containing Child Pornography.
1f79104a765c4111a04987ef2adcd034.remarks: Yatco has ties to Plano, Texas, and the Philippines, where he is believed to be residing.

738a3cd3276d4de1b02ec23ebec19fce.title: ABEL ELIAS ACOSTA
738a3cd3276d4de1b02ec23ebec19fce.description: Unlawful Flight to Avoid Prosecution - Capital Murder of Multiple Persons, Murder
738a3cd3276d4de1b02ec23ebec19fce.caution: Abel Elias Acosta is wanted for his alleged involvement in the murder of several individuals in Garland, Texas.  On December 26, 2021, three juveniles, ages 14, 16, and 17, were shot multiple times and killed in a convenience store, and a fourth was shot and wounded.  Acosta was subsequently identified as the alleged shooter.  On December 17, 2025, the 304th District Court of Dallas County, Texas, issued an arrest warrant for Acosta after he was charged with Capital Murder of Multiple Persons and Murder.  On January 26, 2026, a federal arrest warrant was issued for Acosta in the United States District Court, Northern District of Texas, Dallas, Texas, after he was charged with Unlawful Flight to Avoid Prosecution.
738a3cd3276d4de1b02ec23ebec19fce.remarks: Acosta has ties to Mexico and may be living there.
738a3cd3276d4de1b02ec23ebec19fce.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS

a70bd3607d824eacb19f296bdfac4a1b.title: ROSA MARIE CAMACHO
a70bd3607d824eacb19f296bdfac4a1b.details:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation's New Haven Field Office and the Hartford Police Department in Connecticut are seeking the public’s assistance in locating Rosa Marie Camacho.  She was last seen with her mother as the two were leaving a grocery store in Hartford, Connecticut, on the afternoon of October 24, 1997.  The body of Rosa's mother was later found in a lake in New Jersey, in November of 1997, but Rosa remains missing.  

 

Rosa was four years old at the time of her disappearance and spoke mostly Spanish at the time.  She was last seen wearing a black jacket and blue pants.

1fa52fde689c4a56bb186e68f2648aaa.title: SALLI MARIE THOMAS - WAYNESBORO, VIRGINIA
1fa52fde689c4a56bb186e68f2648aaa.details: Salli Thomas was last heard from by her family in November 2020. Thomas’ nicknames include Salli from the Valley, Slim, and Crazy Slim. She has shoulder-length, dark, curly hair, last described as black, but other photographs show it as auburn. There is a tattoo on her left ankle that reads “SLIM”. At the time she was last heard from, Salli Thomas would have been 48 years old. Investigators ask that anyone with information about her disappearance to please reach out.

2a91872811564867b38693c76737b39a.title: T'KHIRA MONIQUE BROWLEY
2a91872811564867b38693c76737b39a.description:
Homicide Victim
Madison Heights, Virginia
March 19, 2022
2a91872811564867b38693c76737b39a.details: The Federal Bureau of Investigation in Richmond, Virginia, and the Amherst County Sheriff's Office are seeking information regarding the death of 21-year-old T'Khira Monique Browley.  On March 19, 2022, a shooting took place outside of a party on Old Wright Shop Road in Madison Heights, Virginia.  The shooting resulted in the homicide of Browley, a mother of two young boys.  At least four other people were also injured in the shooting.  There have been some new developments in the case, and this remains an active and ongoing investigation.  Information is being sought that would lead to the identification, arrest, and conviction of the individual(s) responsible for her death.

a57a97cbdf654169a6fd617d07d9b6e3.title: MAYUSHI BHAGAT
a57a97cbdf654169a6fd617d07d9b6e3.remarks: Bhagat speaks English, Hindi, and Urdu.  She has friends in the South Plainfield, New Jersey, area.
a57a97cbdf654169a6fd617d07d9b6e3.details: Mayushi Bhagat was last seen in the evening hours of April 29, 2019, leaving her apartment in Jersey City, New Jersey.  She was last seen wearing colorful pajama pants and a black t-shirt.  Bhagat was reported missing by her family on May 1, 2019.  She was attending the New York Institute of Technology (NYIT) in New York City, and was in the United States on an F1 Student Visa.

abb46d2140d64a47a1749190c25a86e9.title: CIVIL UNREST - OREGON
abb46d2140d64a47a1749190c25a86e9.details:
On January 30, 2026, 400 to 500 people participated in an anti-ICE protest at the Federal Building in Eugene, Oregon.  The protest turned into a riot in which the individuals broke windows, spray-painted federal property, and threw rocks at law enforcement officers.  The FBI seeks information that will lead to the identification of any individuals involved in the vandalism and/or destruction of government property.

 

The unknown suspects shown above, one male and one female, were seen in the area and were together the entire night, both arriving and leaving together.

6297a38924874e6b8f4b38d7aa74d860.title: ALFRED RAYMOND MURRAY - DECEASED HOMICIDE OFFENDER
6297a38924874e6b8f4b38d7aa74d860.details:
On March 15, 1964, Mary Simpson (White, Female, age 12) was last seen walking from a family member’s residence in Elmira, New York, at approximately 7pm. Simpson’s remains were located on March 19, 1964, in a wooded area off an old logging road commonly used as a lovers’ lane just outside the city by children playing in the area. Simpson’s remains were concealed underneath multiple large rocks  with the heaviest weighing approximately 110 pounds. Simpson had experienced sexual trauma.


Offender Alfred Raymond Murray (White, Male, age 32) now deceased as of March 16, 2004, was exhumed on November 5, 2025. Murray’s DNA was compared to evidence discovered at the crime scene and was confirmed a match.

Murray was employed by the U.S. Army from 1951 to 1959. Murray was also a truck driver for a moving company named Mayflower Van Lines. Murray lived or was known to travel in New York. The Elmira City Police Department is requesting anyone who has information regarding Murray and his criminal behavior to contact them and provide information.

9ec6b210780643858e7ab470d8b28c72.title: UNKNOWN BANK ROBBER - WISCONSIN
9ec6b210780643858e7ab470d8b28c72.details:
The FBI's Milwaukee Field Office and the West Milwaukee Police Department in Wisconsin are seeking the public's assistance in identifying an unknown bank robber.  On January 12, 2026, at approximately 10:16 a.m., an unidentified subject robbed the U.S. Bank located at 4140 West Greenfield Avenue in West Milwaukee. During the robbery, the subject entered the bank, approached a teller, implied he had a firearm and demanded cash. The subject fled the bank on foot with an undisclosed amount of money and was last seen walking northbound underneath the S. 35th Street viaduct. No one was physically hurt during the robbery.

 

During the robbery, the suspect wore a black mask, black sweatshirt with white lettering saying SAVAGE, dark pants, and dark shoes.
9ec6b210780643858e7ab470d8b28c72.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS

6b803fbe042e44de8b72bbec85e181d0.title: ISIAH JENIFER
6b803fbe042e44de8b72bbec85e181d0.description:
August 28, 2025
Folcroft Borough, Delaware County, Pennsylvania
6b803fbe042e44de8b72bbec85e181d0.remarks: Jenifer has ties to Folcroft, Chester, and Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, and Wilmington, Delaware.
6b803fbe042e44de8b72bbec85e181d0.details: On the afternoon of August 28, 2025, Isiah Jenifer entered a vehicle in Folcroft, Pennsylvania, and is believed to have travelled to Chester City, Pennsylvania.  He has not been seen or heard from since that date.  It is believed that foul play may be involved in his disappearance.

04d4aee30d154f21ae53948f4be7b52b.title: CASINO ROBBERY - NEW MEXICO
04d4aee30d154f21ae53948f4be7b52b.description:
Unknown Suspect
Albuquerque, New Mexico
July 1, 2022
04d4aee30d154f21ae53948f4be7b52b.details:
The FBI's Albuquerque Field Office is seeking information regarding the robbery of the Sandia Resort and Casino in Albuquerque, New Mexico, on the evening of July 1, 2022.  At approximately 9:15 p.m., an unknown armed individual entered the casino at the high-limit room, approached a cashier, and asked to speak with a supervisor. The suspect stated he had a gun and demanded money from the cashier. The suspect was given an undisclosed sum of U.S. currency and left the area in a white Dodge Caravan traveling westbound. 

 

The suspect is described as a White male with an average build weighing 180 to 210 pounds.  He was wearing a gray hoodie, a blue surgical mask over a blue gaiter, a black hat, and jeans.

0f2d43190700454e9ad82e7209bbaf1b.title: NICOLE ELIZABETH MCCARTNEY - HARRISBURG, PENNSYLVANIA
0f2d43190700454e9ad82e7209bbaf1b.details:
Nicole McCartney was reported missing on December 3, 2022, in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, where she was last seen on the same day.  McCartney was wearing a dark-colored hooded sweatshirt at
the time and a pair of jeans. She has her left eyebrow pierced and multiple ear piercings.  She is also missing her molars.  Anyone with information on the whereabouts or disappearance of Nicole McCartney is asked to reach out to investigators.

8b8e74f63b9e47d0829bcb261be85dd2.title: SEAN SUOJANEN - HOMICIDE SUSPECT - PORT RICHEY, FLORIDA
8b8e74f63b9e47d0829bcb261be85dd2.details: On December 20, 2023, Jennifer Suojanen was found murdered in her Port Richey, Florida, residence. Her husband, Sean Suojanen, is currently wanted in connection with this homicide. He was last seen on December 21, 2023, near Margaret Drive in Port Richey.  Anyone with information is asked to contact the Pasco County Sheriff’s Office.

4760d61850d74f4091a8c6e9b22b087a.title: JAKODI KESHONE WILSON
4760d61850d74f4091a8c6e9b22b087a.description: Conspiracy to Traffic Narcotics; Possession with Intent to Distribute
4760d61850d74f4091a8c6e9b22b087a.caution: Jakodi Keshone Wilson is wanted for his alleged involvement in the distribution of methamphetamine and other controlled substances in the Central Florida area.  On December 5, 2025, a federal arrest warrant was issued by the United States District Court for the Middle District of Florida, Tampa, Florida, after Wilson was charged federally with Conspiracy to Traffic Narcotics and Possession with Intent to Distribute.
4760d61850d74f4091a8c6e9b22b087a.remarks: Wilson has ties to North Florida, Central Florida, and Atlanta, Georgia.

9b1a6571e02e4755b1bb2ce94f71b0b6.title: MIGUEL OLIVERAS
9b1a6571e02e4755b1bb2ce94f71b0b6.details: The Federal Bureau of Investigation’s Southern Maine Gang Task Force, and the Portland Police Department in Maine, are investigating the suspicious disappearance of Miguel Oliveras and are asking for the public’s assistance in locating him or his remains.  Oliveras, of Hyde Park, Massachusetts, was last seen around 1:00 a.m. on September 2, 2006, at the Platinum Plus Nightclub on Riverside Street in Portland, Maine.  At that time, he was wearing a gray camouflage long-sleeved shirt with a white t-shirt over it, green cargo shorts, and white sneakers.

e6efbadb6b39486b9a0071a233a175fd.title: SANDRA BURT CARRERA - ARLINGTON, VIRGINIA
e6efbadb6b39486b9a0071a233a175fd.details: On January 15, 1991, Sandra Carrera was found deceased in her townhome, in the Windgate neighborhood of Arlington, Virginia, at the bottom of her stairs. Carrera’s cause of death was a gunshot wound, and her case was ruled a homicide. Nothing in the home appeared to have been disturbed, and nothing was taken. Anyone with information regarding the homicide of Carrera is asked to contact investigators.

0a814ebbc8ef4e84b3de586a49e8e243.title: COLLEEN ELIZABETH PERRIS - PLANTATION, FLORIDA
0a814ebbc8ef4e84b3de586a49e8e243.details:
On September 30, 2000, Colleen Perris was last seen leaving her residence in Plantation, Florida. She had plans to accompany her parents to a baseball game later that day but never returned home. On October 6, 2000, her vehicle was recovered in the parking lot of a shopping center in Tamarac, Florida.


Perris has a butterfly tattoo on her lower back, a Chinese letter/symbol tattoo on her right ankle, and a band/bracelet tattoo on her left ankle. Her ears, navel, and tongue are pierced.


Anyone with information regarding Perris’s disappearance is asked to contact the Plantation Police Department.

5da32b94b6e14977a2bf41b06b65ce37.title: JEREMIAH JAKE
5da32b94b6e14977a2bf41b06b65ce37.details: The Federal Bureau of Investigation in Colorado is seeking information regarding the death of Jeremiah Jake.  On May 22, 2022, a body was found on an island in the middle of the Animas River south of Durango, Colorado, within the exterior boundaries of the Southern Ute Indian Reservation. The body was identified as Jeremiah Jake, a 27-year-old Navajo tribal member from New Mexico, who had been reported missing in April of 2019.

604061113b0742898784103e18451b3d.title: CIVIL UNREST - OREGON
604061113b0742898784103e18451b3d.details:
On January 30, 2026, 400 to 500 people participated in an anti-ICE protest at the Federal Building in Eugene, Oregon.  The protest turned into a riot in which the individuals broke windows, spray-painted federal property, and threw rocks at law enforcement officers.  The FBI seeks information that will lead to the identification of any individuals involved in the vandalism and/or destruction of government property.

 

The unknown suspect shown above was seen in the area and is described as being White with dark hair.  The individual was wearing dark clothing, dark shoes with white soles, tape on the arms, and goggles.

3655754556789142b13969b940b93c2b.title: AMY LYNN BRADLEY

images.caption: Photograph age progressed to 42 years old
Photograph age progressed to 42 years old

3655754556789142b13969b940b93c2b.remarks: Bradley has the following tattoos: a Tasmanian Devil spinning a basketball on her shoulder; the sun on her lower back; a Chinese symbol on her right ankle; and a Gecko lizard on her navel. She also has a navel ring.
3655754556789142b13969b940b93c2b.details: Amy Lynn Bradley, while on a family cruise to the Caribbean, went missing from the Royal Caribbean International Cruise Line’s ship Rhapsody of the Seas.  On Saturday, March 21, 1998, the vessel departed San Juan, Puerto Rico, and traveled to its first port of call, the island of Aruba.  On Monday, March 23, 1998, Rhapsody of the Seas departed Aruba and was traveling in international waters to its next island port of Curacao, Netherlands Antilles.  During the early morning hours of Tuesday, March 24, 1998, Amy Lynn Bradley went missing.  The vessel later departed Curacao and continued on to the island of St. Martin (Sint Maarten) and further traveled to St. Thomas, United States Virgin Islands, before returning to San Juan, Puerto Rico, on Saturday, March 28, 1998.

dd2b306281994ec5a5ff4703dd69120d.title: DALTON MESARCHIK
dd2b306281994ec5a5ff4703dd69120d.details: The Federal Bureau of Investigation and Illinois State Police are seeking the public's assistance in identifying the individual(s) responsible for the disappearance and death of 7-year-old Dalton Mesarchik. Dalton was reported missing on March 26, 2003, after disappearing from the front yard of his home in Streator, Illinois. Dalton’s body was found the following day in the Vermillion River.

85b1593861154d7884e0fc1fcc2582e7.title: WILFREDO PUJOLS-SEPULVEDA
85b1593861154d7884e0fc1fcc2582e7.description: Possession of a Firearm by a Prohibited Person (Felon); Possession of a Machine Gun; Firearms Trafficking; Possession with Intent to Distribute Cocaine Base
85b1593861154d7884e0fc1fcc2582e7.caution: Wilfredo Pujols-Sepulveda is wanted for his alleged involvement in firearms and narcotics trafficking with cocaine in Puerto Rico.  On March 19, 2026, a federal arrest warrant was issued by the United States District Court for the District of Puerto Rico, San Juan, Puerto Rico, after Pujols-Sepulveda was charged federally with Possession of a Firearm by a Prohibited Person (Felon); Possession of a Machine Gun; Firearms Trafficking; and Possession with Intent to Distribute Cocaine Base.
85b1593861154d7884e0fc1fcc2582e7.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS

e7a26977f1fe4686839699a3e152a84b.title: TRUNG DUC LU
e7a26977f1fe4686839699a3e152a84b.description: Conspiracy to Commit Kidnapping; Kidnapping (3 Counts); Interstate Travel in Aid of Racketeering; Conspiracy to Collect an Extension of Credit by Extortionate Means; Collection of an Extension of Credit by Extortionate Means; Conspiracy to Distribute Marijuana; Aiding and Abetting
e7a26977f1fe4686839699a3e152a84b.caution: Trung Duc Lu is wanted in connection with the August 2014 torture, kidnapping, and murder of two Vietnamese brothers in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.  A third male was also tortured and kidnapped, but managed to survive the attack.  On July 10, 2019, a federal arrest warrant was issued for Lu in the United States District Court, Eastern District of Pennsylvania, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, after he was charged with Conspiracy to Commit Kidnapping; Kidnapping (3 Counts); Interstate Travel in Aid of Racketeering; Conspiracy to Collect an Extension of Credit by Extortionate Means; Collection of an Extension of Credit by Extortionate Means; Conspiracy to Distribute Marijuana; and Aiding and Abetting.
e7a26977f1fe4686839699a3e152a84b.remarks: Trung Duc Lu was born in Vietnam and moved to the United States as a teenager.  He has strong ties to New York City, where he resided in the borough of Queens.  Lu is a suspected member of the Born to Kill street gang, also known as BTK or Canal Boys.  He was last confirmed to be in Vietnam.
e7a26977f1fe4686839699a3e152a84b.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS AND AN INTERNATIONAL FLIGHT RISK

36715efc74c94930a5cc5e30d52ab0f8.title: KOA KAI BERNSTEIN
36715efc74c94930a5cc5e30d52ab0f8.description:
October of 2022
Ala Wai Boat Harbor
Honolulu, Hawaii
36715efc74c94930a5cc5e30d52ab0f8.remarks: The Bernstein family has ties to Naples, Florida; Petoskey, Michigan; Lancaster, Pennsylvania; and Hawaii.
36715efc74c94930a5cc5e30d52ab0f8.details: The Federal Bureau of Investigation in Honolulu is seeking information regarding Abigail Bernstein and her two children, Koa Kai Bernstein and Kush Kohole Bernstein.  The family was last seen at Ala Wai Boat Harbor in Honolulu, Hawaii, in October of 2022.

de83f4acce0a4acf919724ec390ea230.title: NAI PING HOU
de83f4acce0a4acf919724ec390ea230.remarks: Hou has ties to Riverside County, California.
de83f4acce0a4acf919724ec390ea230.details: The Federal Bureau of Investigation’s Los Angeles Field Office and the San Bernardino County Sheriff's Department in California, are investigating the suspicious disappearance of Nai Ping Hou and are asking for the public’s assistance in locating him.  He has been missing since March 16, 2025, and was last seen in Rancho Cucamonga, California.  Possible foul play is suspected, as his bank accounts were depleted prior to law enforcement being notified about his disappearance.

2caa95f3b2b34cbda7d70dac99d95b9a.title: KUSH KOHOLE BERNSTEIN
2caa95f3b2b34cbda7d70dac99d95b9a.description:
October of 2022
Ala Wai Boat Harbor
Honolulu, Hawaii
2caa95f3b2b34cbda7d70dac99d95b9a.details: The Federal Bureau of Investigation in Honolulu is seeking information regarding Abigail Bernstein and her two children, Kush Kohole Bernstein and Koa Kai Bernstein.  The family was last seen at Ala Wai Boat Harbor in Honolulu, Hawaii, in October of 2022.

de6fe82fedf64b38b0a1bb97accd80bf.title: CIVIL UNREST - OREGON
de6fe82fedf64b38b0a1bb97accd80bf.details:
On January 30, 2026, 400 to 500 people participated in an anti-ICE protest at the Federal Building in Eugene, Oregon.  The protest turned into a riot in which the individuals broke windows, spray-painted federal property, and threw rocks at law enforcement officers.  The FBI seeks information that will lead to the identification of any individuals involved in the vandalism and/or destruction of government property.

 

The unknown suspect shown above was seen in the area and is described as a White male with dark hair.  He was wearing all dark clothing, a black mask, dark shoes with white soles, and goggles.

8c55bfed9a074d218bfa33aa42ae3667.title: ANA MARIA HENAO KNEZEVIC

images.caption: Ana Maria Henao Knezevic with necklace

8c55bfed9a074d218bfa33aa42ae3667.details:
The FBI's Miami Field Office is seeking information from the public regarding the location of the human remains of Ana Maria Henao Knezevic.  

 

Ana Maria Henao Knezevic, age 40, was last seen on surveillance footage walking into her apartment building in Madrid, Spain, at approximately 1:42 p.m., on February 2, 2024. Later that same day, Ana Maria Henao Knezevic is known to have had a video conference call at 7:00 p.m., and sent her last text message to friends at approximately 10:01 p.m.   At approximately 9:27 p.m., a male believed to be her husband, David Knezevich, was observed on surveillance footage gaining entry into her apartment building wearing a motorcycle helmet and a reflective vest. The individual spray-painted the only surveillance camera in the apartment building lobby, and subsequently left the building with an object, believed by law enforcement to be a rolling suitcase carrying Ana Maria Henao Knezevic’s body.  Ana Maria Henao Knezevic has never been seen again, and all evidence known to date indicates that she is deceased. 

 

David Knezevich rented a dark blue 2019 Peugeot 308 with tinted rear windows to drive from Serbia to Spain. He drove from Serbia through Croatia, France, and Italy, until his final destination of Madrid, Spain. During the trip, he stole multiple license plates in an attempt to conceal his movements. He travelled back to Serbia through the same countries and it is believed he disposed of Ana Maria’s remains during this return trip.  During the course of the investigation, David died by suicide. 

 

The distinctive necklace and journal belonging to the victim were not located in the apartment.  They may be recognizable to someone who saw them.

a219b9f0500740f3908e853a7761ca1b.title: ABIGAIL BERNSTEIN
a219b9f0500740f3908e853a7761ca1b.description:
October of 2022
Ala Wai Boat Harbor
Honolulu, Hawaii
a219b9f0500740f3908e853a7761ca1b.remarks: The Bernstein family has ties to Naples, Florida; Petoskey, Michigan; Lancaster, Pennsylvania; and Hawaii.
a219b9f0500740f3908e853a7761ca1b.details: The Federal Bureau of Investigation in Honolulu is seeking information regarding Abigail Bernstein and her two children, Koa Kai Bernstein and Kush Kohole Bernstein.  The family was last seen at Ala Wai Boat Harbor in Honolulu, Hawaii, in October of 2022.

8b2461d815d5493886832689c2ef538d.title: DONALD STEVEN LANG
8b2461d815d5493886832689c2ef538d.description: Lewd Conduct with a Minor Under Sixteen (3 counts); Sexual Battery of a Minor (1 count)
occupations: Lang is a sailor who does odd jobs, such as fixing boats, on the side.
8b2461d815d5493886832689c2ef538d.caution:
The FBI's Salt Lake City Field Office is assisting the Kootenai County Sheriff's Office in Idaho with the search for Donald Steven Lang. Lang is wanted for his alleged involvement in the sexual assault of a minor in Idaho between 2003 and 2007.  Lang, a Canadian citizen, was last seen on his sailboat, ISHI, in Hawaii, in January of 2025.

 

On April 9, 2025, Donald Steven Lang was charged with three counts of Lewd Conduct with a Minor Under Sixteen and one count Sexual Battery of a Minor in the District Court of the First Judicial District of the State of Idaho, in and for the County of Kootenai, and a state warrant was issued for his arrest.
8b2461d815d5493886832689c2ef538d.remarks: Lang is known to sail around the world, but his "home base" is in Hawaii. He may be sailing somewhere between Hawaii and Fiji, Hawaii and Mexico, towards Papua New Guinea, or possibly Indonesia. He has ties to, or knows people in, Hawaii, Idaho, Washington State, California, Fiji, Marquesas Islands, Mexico, and Canada.
8b2461d815d5493886832689c2ef538d.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED AN ESCAPE RISK

afe37027b23046a6a96f8e42d57d1362.title: JOSEPH MATOS
afe37027b23046a6a96f8e42d57d1362.description: Murder in Aid of Racketeering and Murder Through the Use of a Firearm
afe37027b23046a6a96f8e42d57d1362.caution:
Joseph Matos, also known as "Troubles", is wanted for his alleged involvement in the murder of a National Guard member in the Belmont Cragin neighborhood of Chicago, Illinois on July 3, 2021. The victim had just graduated from basic training and was walking to his car after leaving a party over the Fourth of July weekend when he was alleged to have been shot and killed by Matos and a fellow gang member.

Matos is believed to be a member of the Milwaukee Kings street gang, a criminal organization whose members and associates have engaged in narcotics trafficking and committed acts of violence, including murder and assault, to acquire and preserve the gang’s perceived territory on the North Side of Chicago, Illinois.

On May 14, 2024, an arrest warrant was issued for Matos in the United States District Court, Northern District of Illinois, Eastern Division, Chicago, Illinois, after he was charged with murder in aid of racketeering and murder through the use of a firearm.
afe37027b23046a6a96f8e42d57d1362.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS

b953c05b852a4b719c0a152ef8a73ffd.title: BORIS YAKOVLEVICH LIVSHITS
b953c05b852a4b719c0a152ef8a73ffd.description: Conspiracy to Defraud the United States; Conspiracy to Violate the International Emergency Economic Powers Act (IEEPA); Bank Fraud Conspiracy; Wire Fraud Conspiracy; Wire Fraud; Money Laundering Conspiracy; Money Laundering; Conspiracy to Violate the Export Control Reform Act (ECRA); Smuggling Goods from the United States; Failure to File Electronic Export Information
b953c05b852a4b719c0a152ef8a73ffd.caution:
Boris Yakovlevich Livshits is wanted for his alleged involvement in the Russian-backed procurement network Serniya/Sertal from 2017 to 2022. Livshits and his co-conspirators allegedly unlawfully sourced, purchased, and shipped military and sensitive dual-use technologies from United States manufacturers to Russian end users. These items included advanced testing equipment used in quantum computing, hypersonic missiles, nuclear weapons development, and other military and space-based military applications.

 

Serniya’s clients included the National Research Nuclear University of the Moscow Engineering Physics Institute; the Ministry of Defense; the Foreign Intelligence Service ("SVR"); and various components of the Federal Security Service ("FSB"), Russia's principal security agency and the main successor agency to the Soviet Union's KGB.

 

Livshits allegedly controlled several American and international front companies that operated on behalf of the Serniya Network. These entities conducted no actual business and were allegedly used to obfuscate the role of Russian or sanctioned entities in transactions with American and Western technology companies. Livshits allegedly facilitated the financing and smuggling of tens of thousands of controlled, American-manufactured military grade sniper bullets and rounds.  Livshits was indicted by the United States District Court, Eastern District of New York, Brooklyn, New York, on December 5, 2022, and a federal warrant was issued for his arrest.
b953c05b852a4b719c0a152ef8a73ffd.remarks: Livshits has ties to Russia, Estonia, Finland, Kazakhstan, Germany, Latvia, Lithuania, and the United States.

b4db60d7ed14449cb73ba39564ef9e19.title: JAMES S. RULAND - NORTH FOND du LAC, WISCONSIN
b4db60d7ed14449cb73ba39564ef9e19.description:
October 26, 1995
North Fond du Lac, Wisconsin
b4db60d7ed14449cb73ba39564ef9e19.remarks:
Distinguishing Characteristics: Metal plate in head - bilateral burr holes/shunts, mustache

Clothing/Belongings: Green camouflage jacket, silver wire rimmed glasses
b4db60d7ed14449cb73ba39564ef9e19.details:
On Thursday, October 26, 1995, James S. Ruland was last seen hitchhiking in North Fond du Lac, Wisconsin. Nine days later, he was reported missing by his sister. On November 14, 1995, Ruland’s white Dodge Aires station wagon was recovered from the Stretch Truck Stop near North Fond du Lac. The keys were in the ignition and Ruland’s personal possessions were in the cargo area.

Ruland sustained a severe head injury when he was young which required a shunt implant. The initial shunt failed, necessitating a second shunt. The implants required “bilateral burr holes” so the shunts could pass through his skull. Fond du Lac Sheriff’s Office is requesting assistance with locating Ruland.

b166d627e11149aa82c02d1533e3b650.title: JESUS DE LA CRUZ - LYNN, MASSACHUSETTS

images.caption: Photograph taken at Time of Disappearance
Photograph Age Progressed to 31 Years Old

b166d627e11149aa82c02d1533e3b650.remarks: De la Cruz has a scar above his left eye, birthmarks on his left calf and the left side of his forehead, and has his left ear pierced.
b166d627e11149aa82c02d1533e3b650.details: Jesus de la Cruz was last seen on September 28, 1996, walking on Park Street near his residence in Lynn, Massachusetts. He was six years old at the time of his disappearance and has not been seen since. De la Cruz has a scar above his left eye, birthmarks on his left calf and the left side of his forehead, and his left ear is pierced. He was last seen wearing a white t-shirt, blue jeans, and brown and yellow boots.

55b4a8a4053a4816befef81fe2b0c514.title: KENNETH EARL FOX - HOMESTEAD, FLORIDA
55b4a8a4053a4816befef81fe2b0c514.details:
Kenneth Fox was last heard from on April 1,1989, when he called his mother from a pay phone in Homestead, Florida. At the time of his disappearance, he was homeless and staying
in a wooded area. Records suggest that he may have traveled to Texas, Arizona, and California in the summer of 1991. He may have traveled to Georgia in 1997. Fox was originally from Lexington, Kentucky. His top or bottom front tooth is chipped. He was last known to be traveling by bicycle, on foot, or by hitchhiking.


Anyone with information is asked to contact the Homestead Police Department.

cd626d1aedfd4acc816a1a3a418b1472.title: EDWIN ERNESTO CEDILLOS-RODRIGUEZ
cd626d1aedfd4acc816a1a3a418b1472.description: Conspiracy to Provide and Conceal Material Support and Resources to Terrorists; Narco-Terrorism Conspiracy; Racketeering Conspiracy
cd626d1aedfd4acc816a1a3a418b1472.caution:
Edwin Ernesto Cedillos-Rodriguez is wanted for his alleged involvement in the direction of MS-13 activity in the United States, Mexico, and El Salvador.  He is alleged to be a senior leader of MS-13.  Cedillos-Rodriguez has been charged with several offenses for his alleged role in ordering numerous acts of violence against civilians and rival gang members, as well as his role in drug distribution and extortion schemes in the United States and El Salvador.  A federal arrest warrant was issued for Cedillos-Rodriguez in the United States District Court, Eastern District of New York, Central Islip, New York, on September 22, 2022, after he was charged with Conspiracy to Provide Material Support to Terrorists, Narco-Terrorism Conspiracy, and Racketeering Conspiracy.

 

This case is being investigated as part of Joint Task Force Vulcan.
cd626d1aedfd4acc816a1a3a418b1472.warning_message: SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS

7d60ad83779047dd95914d0d1bf79e11.title: JOHN DOE - WATERLOO TOWNSHIP, MICHIGAN
7d60ad83779047dd95914d0d1bf79e11.remarks:
Unknown Distinguishing Characteristics: May have had a sizable scar on right shoulder from surgical intervention. Missing 10 teeth including the two upper front teeth. Evidence of a healed nasal fracture.

Clothing/Belongings: Blue jeans (size 26 waist, 33 ½” inseam); violet long-sleeve blouse (size 14, 100% silk, label "IRKA"); beige long-sleeve blouse (size 5/6, 100% polyester, label "RD2"); reddish brown nylon neck scarf; panty hose; bra (size 34); bikini panty (size 4); glossy black high heeled shoes (4 1/2 inch) with gold tassel ankle tie; gold bracelet.
7d60ad83779047dd95914d0d1bf79e11.details: On Wednesday, August 30, 1978, the skeletal remains of a black male dressed in women’s clothing and a wig were found bound and wrapped in plastic trash bags. The male had a right shoulder surgical implantation of two large staples into the lateral aspect of greater tubercle of the right humerus and a 32 mm (1 ¼”) screw into the anterior border of glenoid fossa of the right scapula. He was missing 10 teeth to include his two upper front teeth and there was evidence of a healed nasal fracture. The cause of death could not be determined; however, based on how the body was found this case is considered a homicide. The Michigan State Police (MSP) Violent Crimes Unit (VCU) is requesting assistance with identifying this male and any similar cases.

1584feee758e4cd39136171ef1c007f9.title: BRYAN MATTHEW MCGEHRIN - TANEYTOWN, MARYLAND
1584feee758e4cd39136171ef1c007f9.remarks: McGehrin was last wearing gray sweatpants, a blue/gray hooded jacket, white tennis shoes, and a baseball cap.
1584feee758e4cd39136171ef1c007f9.details: Bryan McGehrin was last seen at his mother’s residence on October 25, 2019, in Taneytown, Maryland.  When he left her residence, he did not say where he was going.  He was released from jail in Hagerstown, Maryland, two days prior.  McGehrin does not have a cell phone but would historically make contact with his family using his friends’ phones.  McGehrin has depression and was not taking medication for it.  He was supposed to attend a probation meeting but missed it. If you have any information regarding this investigation, please contact the Westminster Police Department.

4e1704f560464ec6a57a56c60f53bebc.title: CRYSTAL ROGERS
4e1704f560464ec6a57a56c60f53bebc.details:
On July 5, 2015, Crystal Rogers was reported missing by her mother, after she had not been seen or heard from since the evening of July 3, 2015. The same day Rogers was reported missing, her car was found abandoned with a flat tire at mile marker 14 on the Bluegrass Parkway in Bardstown, Kentucky.  Rogers' keys, phone, and purse were still inside her red Chevrolet Impala.  Rogers was the mother of five children and was not known to go anywhere without her children. 

 

In July of 2025, an individual was found guilty by a jury for the murder of Crystal Rogers.  The FBI continues to seek information from the public that would assist in locating her remains.

 

On November 19, 2016, Rogers' father Tommy Ballard was shot and killed on family property near Bluegrass Parkway in Bardstown, Kentucky.

4f5f62ea98c34547a11f12fd12e040ca.title: IDA DEAN (RICHARDSON) ANDERSON - ANN ARBOR, MICHIGAN
4f5f62ea98c34547a11f12fd12e040ca.remarks: Ida Dean (Richardson) Anderson usually wore dresses, long skirts, and button-up shirts.
4f5f62ea98c34547a11f12fd12e040ca.details: Ida Dean (Richardson) Anderson, a 21-year-old white female, was last seen on September 18, 1958, in Ann Arbor, Michigan. She was due in court the next day for her parental rights case and was to be awarded custody of her children, but due to conflicting court documents it is unclear if she showed up. Ida had left her husband in March 1958 and was hospitalized soon after for various illnesses. As a result, her estranged husband placed their children in a boarding home and moved to Chicago while Ida was in the hospital. The state of Michigan took custody of the children and Ida had been fighting to get them back since she was released. Arrangements had been made for Ida and her children to fly to Florida to visit family after the September 19, 1958, court date but she did not show. Prior to her disappearance, Ida remained in constant contact with her family via mail. Anyone with information regarding Ida’s disappearance is asked to contact the Ann Arbor Police Department.
